title: Suspected lateral movement via mimikatz on workstation
description: Process command line contains references to credential theft tooling. The phrase 'pass-the-hash' appears in the script block. Possible mimikatz invocation detected by string match.

process.name: powershell.exe
process.commandLine: powershell -nop -w hidden -c "Write-Host 'this is a test that mentions mimikatz and lateral movement'"

rawAlert._demo_note: Same text content as keyword_only_alert.json, plus one outbound IP. The engine runs the IP through six threat-intel providers and the local IOC DB. Even on a fresh install with no API keys, providers like the proxy/VPN classifier fire verified-tier signals on most non-residential IPs — confidence.score lands in the 60s, label 'high'. To see a known_malicious_ip hit specifically, replace 1.2.3.4 with any current Feodo Tracker IP from https://feodotracker.abuse.ch/downloads/ipblocklist.csv after the local feed download has run.
